user.title: Amtrak Train Tracker
user.description: Set up a tracker for Amtrak trains between an origin and destination station for specific days and a scheduled departure time window.

data.days: Days of the week to track

error.invalid_origin: Invalid origin station code. Please use a valid 3-letter Amtrak code.
error.invalid_destination: Invalid destination station code. Please use a valid 3-letter Amtrak code.
error.same_stations: Origin and destination stations cannot be the same.
error.invalid_time_format: Time format must be HH:MM (e.g., 08:00 or 15:30).
error.invalid_time_range: End time must be after start time.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Amtraker API. Please verify internet connection.

init.title: Configure Amtrak Tracker
init.description: Configure notification and tracking settings for this Amtrak commute.
